items.deck: St Kilda player Jack Silvagni and his wife Grace have announced some good news.

items.title: Cases like Jimmy Gracey, Riley Strain hard to fully solve
items.deck: Jimmy Gracey's death calls may prove as difficult to solve as a missing person case from years earlier.

items.title: Airports on verge of having to SHUT DOWN and stop all flights as TSA chaos triggers mass travel hell
items.deck: While they cannot close down airports through any specific action, TSA agents essentially keep airports running, as the pre-flight checks are a requirement for planes to take off.

items.title: 'Just stab and go': Shock as elderly man and young childcare worker, 25, are allegedly knifed in the back just hours apart in Melbourne
items.deck: Two random daylight stabbings just hours apart have left Melbourne on edge this week.

items.title: Luka Doncic's bitter legal battle with ex-fiancee takes new twist as NBA star calls for judge to scrap 'improper' court filing
items.deck: Earlier this month it was revealed that the NBA superstar, 27, has separated from fashion and fitness model Anamaria Goltes , 28, amid their bitter legal battle.

items.title: Iran’s execution of wrestler heartbreaking: Human-rights activist
items.deck: Decorated wrestler Saleh Mohammadi was accused in the deaths of two police officers in anti-government protests.

items.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer star Nicholas Brendon dead at 54 as 'heartbroken' family reveal cause of death
items.deck: The actor was best known for playing Xander Harris in the television series Buffy the Vampire Slayer as well as Kevin Lynch in Criminal Minds.
